creator: paul.hamilton@thomasmiller.com
text:
Unable to install FreeBSD 4.0-Release on Compaq Prosignia 300 with Compaq Smart2/E Raid array controller.
This is the same problem as in misc/18065. I have tried the KERN and MFSROOT floppies from snapshot 20000626 but same error

How-To-Repeat: Try to install FreeBSD 4.0-Release on Compaq server with SMART2/E Raid array controller.
